title: Verify and restore a backup
description: Produce a consistent backup, check its integrity, and rehearse restore so the file is known-good.
body: Steps: 1. Create the backup with VACUUM INTO or the online backup API while the app runs. 2. Open the backup and run PRAGMA integrity_check (and PRAGMA foreign_key_check). 3. Restore into a scratch location and run application smoke queries against it. 4. Record the backup's row counts/checksums to compare against the source at backup time. 5. Automate the verify step so a bad backup is caught immediately. Rollback point: keep the previous known-good backup until the new one verifies. Validation: integrity_check returns ok, foreign_key_check is empty, and the restored database serves smoke queries.
